title: 3D World Decorations
description: This is a simple addition to decorate your world
body:
### This resource pack contains various decorative 3D models to enhance your gaming experience. 
It will contain both remade and expanded blocks and items from vanilla Minecraft. For example, you can find stones in the forest or shells on the sand of the coast.


### Found a problem? Any wishes or suggestions?
Contact me: **thrd.dim@gmail.com**
